name: plaintext-requested-full-factorial
description: Full plaintext factorial design using the requested Kafka deployment and producer workload parameters.
implementation_notes: This is the earlier requested plaintext-only matrix retained for historical validation context.
The reduced final campaign lives in config/factorials/security-overhead-final.json.
broker_count changes require separate infrastructure phases; do not label a five-broker cluster as a three-broker run.
producer_count values above 1 are supported by true concurrent producer execution.
compression_type and min_insync_replicas are wired into the plaintext benchmark path.
